enrichment.summary: Kyle gives a brief late-night vlog from his Boulder apartment, recapping his day: gutter work on a job site, ski resort mapping work (Silverton and Aspen Highlands), a postponed voting errand with his mom, dinner at a nearby Indian restaurant, and laundry. He also mentions that his video upload speeds seem to have improved and he hopes to get back to making request-style videos.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: It was okay for a first visit
Acknowledges he doesn't do it often and feels behind on vacuuming
Frustrated that he can rarely respond to comments due to a technical issue with videos not loading

transcript.text: Hello, living in Boulder V-Log for the October 25th. Wow, almost the end of October.
It's 11, 17 at night. I have to work tomorrow, so I'm going to go to sleep right after this.
That painting my grandmother painted.
This is in my living room on my couch.
Never done a video log from here before.
So today we went into a house to do gutters in the house.
But I guess weather didn't do the windows, just did the gutter.
And I got a nozzle stuck in the gutter and I had to take it apart.
And then I dropped my hat in that neighbor's yard and I had to jump in the neighbor's yard to get my hat.
And then I came home and I did Silverton.
I mapped Silverton and Aspen Highlands.
And I'm still on track for mid next week.
I could bring down with ski resorts and get back to Boulder.
I was working a day and then my mom wanted me to go over to her house and help her out with stuff.
But she wasn't ready.
She kept postponing.
Oh, and then we were going to vote.
I wanted to vote to hear.
That's my mom.
But she took too long to come over to me.
But she took me to dinner.
We went to this Indian place.
It was okay for the first time.
Like a couple blocks from my house.
A block from my house or something.
And then I came back here and I worked some more.
And then I did my laundry.
So, yeah, I don't often do laundry.
I should vacuum tomorrow.
I think I've been vacuuming for like two weeks.
But I'm really tired.
That's probably why I'm yawning so much.
But that's good because I guess I don't mean I can get to sleep.
So, I'm going to go to sleep.
Now, I think my video from yesterday uploaded pretty damn quick, man.
I think I was looking at the thing going.
So, I don't think I have a problem.
I mean, I haven't tried it yet.
But, yeah, I might be able to upload videos again.
So, tomorrow or something, just as soon as I can get around to it,
I'm going to try to do some more videos.
Like the report request videos.
I can't respond to most of the comments.
It's weird.
Only every once in a blue moon, I can respond to somebody's comment.
And it's when the videos load.
So, I don't know what that was going on with that.
So, excuse me.
It's weird.
It's kind of too bad because I left it.
I can't respond to every comment.
But, whatever.
Okay.
Peace out.
